note: Analysis plan and decision rule frozen before computation (geo15-style). Thresholds are project-management rules, not preregistered criteria. Seed labels follow the project's date-like naming convention; they are labels, not timestamps.
label: TEST 2: task-sensitivity positive control for the family-grouped domain-transfer design
design: synthetic pseudo-channels: 150 families x 3 channels x 600 records, family magnitude d~Unif{4..8}; class B = recording treatment; identical GroupKFold(5) macro-AUC pipeline as geo15
permutation_null: family-level label permutation, 20 draws, on the largest-effect condition
diagnostics: per-fold AUC, per-fold family and class counts for the real geo15 S1 stage
sensitivity_rule: design is task-sensitive iff AUC >= 0.8 at grid100_full and AUC is nondecreasing in measured grid-mass shift within 0.05 tolerance; permutation AUCs within [0.4,0.6]
